name: UNIVERSAL INSURANCE HOLDINGS, INC.
business: Universal Insurance Holdings, Inc. is a holding company offering property and casualty insurance and value-added insurance services, primarily for personal residential homeowners in Florida and other states.

exposures.sentence: Universal Insurance Holdings, Inc. (UVE, and together with its wholly-owned subsidiaries, we, our, us, or the Company) is a holding company offering property and casualty insurance and value-added insurance services.

catalysts.event: Board authorizes additional $20 million share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the Board authorized an additional $20 million of share repurchases.
For 2026, the following rate changes for UPCIC have been approved by regulators in states other than Florida: Maryland: +4.6%, effective January 1, 2026, for new business and renewal business

catalysts.event: North Carolina rate increase of 7.5% effective
catalysts.sentence: North Carolina: +7.5%, effective June 1, 2026, for new business and renewal business
